title: eleogiton litoralis
intro: Eleogiton litoralis, also known as sea arrowgrass, is a coastal plant species that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Eleogiton litoralis include its ability to treat digestive issues, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Herbal preparations of Eleogiton litoralis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and creams for various health applications.
